title: Ghostpile
summary: A dodge-run chain letter. Hold to fly, release to fall, thread the cave — and every player who beats the link is frozen inside it as a solid wall, so each share makes the level harder. The whole pile of ghosts is encoded in the URL — no backend.

title: Sorta
summary: A daily deduction game. A machine has one secret rule about shapes — probe it, crack the rule, then ace the 5-shape exam everyone on Earth takes today. Wordle-style spoiler-free emoji-grid share.

title: Tabfish
summary: The fishing game you play by not playing it. Cast your lure, switch tabs and work — it sinks in real time toward rarer, deeper fish, even while the tab is closed. Your tab title flips to FISH ON when one bites.

title: Askew
summary: Tap the exact center of 20 shapes in 45 seconds. Askew separates your precision from your bias and reveals which way your brain secretly leans — a shareable identity number and scatter plot.

title: Ghostball
summary: A ball rolls behind a wall. Tap the exact instant it should come out the other side. A ghost replay shows how many milliseconds early or late you were — a benchmark of your brain's built-in physics engine.

title: Petri
summary: A daily Game of Life puzzle. Plant a few cells on today's dish, press play, and watch Conway's Game of Life bloom to light up every target — using as few seeds as you can. Same dish for everyone, new puzzle daily.

title: Statue
summary: Press and hold, and stay perfectly still for 30 seconds while the page tries to make you flinch — a flash, a fake notification, a spider. A live seismograph rates your stillness.

title: Wallflower
summary: An idle game that punishes you for playing it. A plant that only grows while you're NOT looking — in real time, even with the tab closed. Bring your cursor near and it feels watched, recoils, and wilts.

title: Longfire
summary: Keep a single flame alive in real time — it burns down even while the tab is closed and can die while you sleep. Feed it logs before the fuel runs out, or pass it to a friend in a link like an Olympic torch, carrying its whole age.

title: Wordle Clone
summary: A fully playable Wordle clone with daily words and statistics.
